name: Peter Warren Automotive Holdings Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 52% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.9550, stop A$0.8415, target A$1.1300 (1.54:1) — then trail it.
